zh.Macclesfield, Cheshire, England: 英國爾馬可萊斯費爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hawise de Chester Countess of Lincoln於1180年出生在英國爾切斯特時，她的父親Hugh of Cyfeiliog 5th Earl of Chester34歲，母親Bertrade de Montfort25歲。她和Robert de Quincy, the Younger至少有1個女兒。她去世於1241年6月6日之後在英國英格蘭爾切斯特。

zh-hans.Macclesfield, Cheshire, England: 英国爾馬可萊斯費爾德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hawise de Chester Countess of Lincoln于1180年出生在英国爾切斯特时，她的父亲Hugh of Cyfeiliog 5th Earl of Chester34岁，母亲Bertrade de Montfort25岁。她和Robert de Quincy, the Younger至少有1个女儿。她去世于1241年6月6日之后在英国英格兰爾切斯特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Chester
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Chester, the county seat of Cheshire, or from any of various smaller places called with this word (as for example Little Chester in Derbyshire, Chester le Street in County Durham, or Chesters in Northumberland), which is from Old English ceaster ‘Roman fort or walled city’ (from Latin castra ‘legionary camp’).

variants.name: Cheshire
meanings: English: habitational name for someone from the county of Cheshire in northwestern England, the name of which is early recorded as Cestrescire, from the name of the county seat, Chester , + Old English scīr ‘district, division’.

variants.name: Chesterman
meanings: English: possibly a topographic name for someone who lived by a Roman fort, Old English ceaster, or a habitational name for someone from any of the places mentioned at Chester .

nameMeanings.name: Hawise
meanings: This female name (which has been corrupted down to Avice and Avis) is from Hadewisa, formed from the German name Hedvig, same as Edwig, which Wachter translates 'propugnator felicitatis;' say, 'fortunate soldier.'

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Hawise de Chester Countess of Lincoln was born in 1180, in Chester, Cheshire, England, her father, Hugh of Cyfeiliog 5th Earl of Chester, was 34 and her mother, Bertrade de Montfort, was 25. She had at least 1 daughter with Robert de Quincy, the Younger. She died after 6 June 1241, in Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hawise de Chester Countess of Lincoln est née en 1180, à Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh of Cyfeiliog 5th Earl of Chester, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Bertrade de Montfort, avait 25 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Robert de Quincy, the Younger. Elle est décédée après 6 juin 1241, à Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hawise de Chester Countess of Lincoln 1180 in Chester, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh of Cyfeiliog 5th Earl of Chester 34 und ihre Mutter Bertrade de Montfort 25. Sie hatte mit Robert de Quincy, the Younger mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 6. Juni 1241 in Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hawise de Chester Countess of Lincoln è nata il nel 1180 nel Chester, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Hugh of Cyfeiliog 5th Earl of Chester, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Bertrade de Montfort, aveva 25 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Robert de Quincy, the Younger. Morì dopo il 6 giugno 1241, nel Chester, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Hawise de Chester Countess of Lincolnが1180年にイギリスチェシュアイアチェスターで生まれた時，父Hugh of Cyfeiliog 5th Earl of Chesterは34歳，母Bertrade de Montfortは25歳であった。彼女はRobert de Quincy, the Youngerとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1241年6月6日以後にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアチェスターで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hawise de Chester Countess of Lincoln(이)가 1180년 영국 체실르 체스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh of Cyfeiliog 5th Earl of Chester(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Bertrade de Montfort(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 Robert de Quincy, the Younger(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1241년 6월 6일 이후 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 체스터에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hawise de Chester Countess of Lincoln nasceu em 1180, em Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh of Cyfeiliog 5th Earl of Chester, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Bertrade de Montfort, tinha 25 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com Robert de Quincy, the Younger. Ela faleceu após 6 de junho de 1241, em Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hawise de Chester Countess of Lincoln родилась в 1180 г. в местности честир, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Hugh of Cyfeiliog 5th Earl of Chester было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Bertrade de Montfort, 25. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Robert de Quincy, the Younger. Она умерла после 6 июнь 1241 г. в местности честир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hawise de Chester Countess of Lincoln nació en 1180, en Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh of Cyfeiliog 5th Earl of Chester, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Bertrade de Montfort, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Robert de Quincy, the Younger. Murió después de 6 de junio de 1241, en Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
